name: We're All Gonna Die (Even Jay Baruchel)
original_name: We're All Gonna Die (Even Jay Baruchel)
overview: Jay Baruchel joins top scientists, activists, and experts to explore the global crises that could cause humanity's demise, all while finding the solutions and technological innovations that might save us all.
